title: Guess The Star Wars Movie From Just One Iconic Line
dek: No character names, no spoilers pointing you to the answer — just the line. Can your Jedi brain pull the title out of thin air?

items.quote: May the Force be with you.
items.reveal_title: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope (1977)
Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
Star Wars: Episode VI - Return of the Jedi (1983)
Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace (1999)

items.quote: I don't like sand. It's coarse and rough and irritating, and it gets everywhere.
items.reveal_title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones (2002)

items.quote: It's over! I have the high ground.
items.reveal_title: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith (2005)

items.quote: I am one with the Force. The Force is with me.
items.reveal_title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (2016)
Star Wars: Episode VII - The Force Awakens (2015)

items.quote: This is not going to go the way you think.
items.reveal_title: Star Wars: Episode VIII - The Last Jedi (2017)

sources.title: Know Your Meme: I Don't Like Sand
